titleStmt.title: SII 10.573: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 573. (A.R. No. 402 of 1915.) ON A PILLAR SET UP IN FRONT OF THE SHRINE OF ĀÑJANĒYA, APPĀPURAM, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT. Ś. 1327. (Pārthiva)

summary.p: States that Kāvūri Vallabhiseṭṭi got excavated a tank called Gōvardhanasamudramu, consecrated the image of Kēśava-Perumāḷḷu on the bund of that tank and endowed that temple with four and half puṭṭis of land with the permission of king Peda-Kōmaṭi-Vēma.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta praśastisahitaṁ
bai Analpaṁ baina kalpāraṁbha
kālaṁbuna mahāvarāha
daṁṣṭrāśikharaṁbuna nudhṛ
taṁ bai paṁcāśatkōṭiyō
janavistī¨rṇaṁ baina bhūmaṁḍa
laṁbunaṁddu jaṁbūdvīpaṁ
bulō bhāratava¨rṣaṁbuna bhā
ratakhaṁḍḍaṁbunaṁddu mē
ruvuparyaṁtaṁbunaku da
kṣaṇadigbhāgaṁbuna śrīśaila
vāyasamudrapā¨rśvaṁ
buna nōṁkkāranadītīraṁ
bunaṁ driliṁggadēśāla
ṁkkāraṁ baina kōṭabhū
mikammanāṁṭi sīmā
stalaṁbunaṁddu nādi
ṁḍlapuraṁbuna nakhila
brahmāṁḍḍakōṭināya
kuṁ ḍai hariśīmakri
ṣṇamadhavaṁ¨rmmabuddha
va¨rmmacikkabhīmādima
hārājulacēta nārā
dhaniyyuṁ ḍaina śrī

śrīgōva[¨r]dha
nnidhiṁ
ṁbunaka
ṁbunamā va
śaṁbulaṁddu nēḍēḍuda
raṁbulavāri nuttamalō
kaṁbulu siddhiṁccuṭakuṁ
danakuṁ butrapautrābhi
vṛddhiyu dhanakanakavastu
vāhanasamṛddhiyu nagu
naṭlugā śākābdaṁlu vēyi
munnūṁṭairuvai yēḍu
Agu pā¨rddhivasaṁvatsaraṁbu
na māghaśuddha Ēkādaśiguru
vāraṁbunaṁddu kāṁcci
śrītiruvēṁggaḷaśrīranggādi
tī¨rddhasēvāparāyaṇuṇḍḍu
nu śrīkoṭyadonakēśavanātha
dēvaradivyaśrīpādapadmārā
dhakuṁḍḍunu nayyāvaḷi
puravarādhīśvaruṁ ḍaina va
riḍālagōtṛṁḍḍu kāvūri
Ādimūlamaseṭṭi satpu
tṛṁ ḍaina siṁggamaseṭṭi su
putṛṁḍu kāvūrivallabhiseṭṭi
paśupakṣimṛgaṁbumanuṣyu
lādiṁggala yenaṁbhainālugu
lakṣalu jītavajātulakuṁ dṛ
ptigā nācandratārā¨rkkamu
gā gōva¨rdhanasamudraṁ banu
taṭākaṁbu gaṭṭiṁcci Ikaṭa

mīṁdaṁ bratiṣṭiṁccina kēśava
perumāḷlaku naivēdyaṁbu
lakuṁ pedakōmaṭivēma
bhūpālunicētaṁ gēsaripā
ṭini gōcarmaṁ baina nālugu
vuṭluṁ baṁdumukṣētraṁ
bu taṭākaṁbu venakanu ca
tuśśīmalakunnu śilāstaṁbbhā
lu vēIṁcci Ippiṁcce Idha
¨rmmaṁbu paripālanaṁbu
sēsina vāriki dviguṇaphalaṁ
bu Idha¨rmmaṁbunaku hani ka
lpiṁccinavāriki guṁcchapā
takakārāvamahāraura
vādighōranarakaṁbulu
Idi vurāṇētihāsada¨rmma
śā strasiddhaniścayaprakā
raṁbū maṁgaḷamahāśrī
śrīśrīṁjēyun®
Digital edition of SII 10.573 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
